Activity Visibility

Financial Goals
RWF inflation ~5–8%/yr. GPS uses Fisher real rate: (1+return)/(1+inflation)−1. A 10% nominal return at 7% inflation = only 2.8% real growth. Under-setting this will make your freedom date too optimistic.
Freedom Number = expenses ÷ SWR

🆘 Emergency Fund Target
💡 Most financial advisors recommend 3–6 months of essential expenses as your emergency fund.
🕌 Faith & Finance

Your money decisions are shaped by your values. Enable this so your AI advisor understands your religious financial principles — from halal money in Islam to tithing in Christianity to tzedakah in Judaism.

Enable Faith Filter
AI advice will respect your religious principles
Strict Mode
Flag ALL borderline transactions, not just clear violations

All your transactions, assets, and settings are saved automatically in your browser's local database. Export a backup or import a previous one.

Decision Journal

Think through any financial decision with 24 questions

Before you decide — think it through
The app shows you the numbers. This journal asks the questions the numbers can't answer — who's affected, why it matters, and what you're assuming. Takes 3–5 minutes.

Rwanda PAYE Bands (RRA — 2025/26)
0 – 60,000 RWF/month
0%
Exempt
60,001 – 100,000 RWF/month
10%
on this band
100,001 – 200,000 RWF/month
20%
on this band
Above 200,000 RWF/month
30%
on this band
Source: Rwanda Revenue Authority (RRA). Rates effective 2025/26 fiscal year. RSSB employee contribution: 3% of gross. RSSB employer contribution: 5%. Maternity fund: 0.3%. This is an estimate only — consult a tax professional for official filings.

Add Asset
📈 Capital Lease — you build equity. Payment splits into principal + interest.
Auto-creates a recurring rule that splits each payment into equity + interest expense.
💸 Operating Lease — pure expense. No ownership at end.
Auto-creates a recurring expense rule. Renewal alert fires 60 days before end.
✅ Purchase value will be auto-logged as an expense in transactions.
